news.title: Brent crude oil price surges past $100 as Houthi tanker attacks in Red Sea rattle markets
news.description: Brent crude surged above $100 a barrel after Houthi rebels claimed attacks on Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, escalating supply concerns. Rising crude prices intensified inflation fears, lifted bond yields and heightened risks to global energy markets.

news.title: RBI sold $6 billion in May to defend oil-hit Indian rupee, data shows
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India sold $6.1 billion in foreign exchange during May.  This intervention occurred as oil prices surged, pushing the rupee to a record low.  The central bank also implemented policy measures to encourage dollar inflows into India.

news.title: Iberdrola to buy majority stake in Finnish power distributor Caruna
news.description: Under the agreement, Iberdrola will acquire 80% of Caruna's equity for $2.3bn (€2.01bn), with AMF and Elo retaining the 20% stake.
